title: Grimoire
description: There are brand new mobs such as the dryad, siren and doll. while also introducing new recipes and achievements.
body:
# ✨ Arcane Expansion

**Arcane Expansion** expands Minecraft with new mobs, tools, progression systems, and mechanics—while maintaining a balanced, vanilla-friendly experience.

---

## 📦 Features

### 🔧 Crafting & Progression

* New recipes for **Netherite**, **Diamond**, and **Emerald**
* Recipes unlock dynamically as you collect materials
* Additional unlocks tied to **advancements**
* Full recipe access via the **Doll interface**
* **48 custom advancements** guiding progression

---

### 🧙 Tools, Weapons & Items

* **Grimoire** → upgraded to **Waxed Grimoire**
* **Anchor variants**:

  * Base Anchor
  * **Diamond Anchor**
  * **Siren Anchor**
  * **Honey Anchor**
* **Katana** – fast melee weapon
* **Hammer** – heavy axe-like tool *(fixed extreme knockback)*
* **Syringe** – upgraded, versatile utility tool
* **Remote** – utility/control item
* **Green Lantern** – interacts with ores to generate blocks
* New materials including **Scale ingots**

⚖️ Tools and weapons are balanced for consistent progression.

---

### 👁️ Mobs & Creatures

A diverse set of original entities:

* **Dryad** – nature spirit with drops
* **Siren** – water-based mob with improved behavior
* **Doll → Puppet → Marionette** – evolving entity chain with new mechanics
* **Vampire** & **Wanderer** – improved AI
* **Sinless Seven** – powerful late-game entity
* **Demiflower** – stabilized after crash fixes
* **Melia** – duplicates itself and drops honey

🧠 AI improvements ensure more natural behavior across hostile and passive mobs.

---

### 🌱 World Additions

* **Withering Rose**

  * Can apply the **Wither effect**
* **Seedling** – new plant
* Additional flora tied to progression and mechanics

---

### 🛡️ Equipment

* **Sirenade Armor** – new armor set
* Progression tied to new materials like **Scale**

---

### 🎁 Systems & Mechanics

* Custom **loot tables**
* Mobs drop useful items
* Resource generation mechanics:

  * **Doll** produces Redstone over time
* Anchors now lose durability when used underwater

---

### 🎮 Quality of Life

* **Guide Menu** (default key: `B`)
* Recipe visibility improvements
* Fixes to mob AI and behavior
* General balancing and bug fixes

---

## 🔄 Version Highlights

### **v1.0.9**

* Added new material recipes
* Introduced Dryad, Siren, and Doll
* Added Grimoire, Anchor, Katana
* Added Withering Rose and advancements

---

### **v1.1.8**

* Recipe unlock system improvements
* Doll recipe interface added
* Added Hammer
* Updated mob textures
* Added Vampire and Wanderer (AI improvements)
* Added loot tables

---

### **v1.2.7**

* Fixed Siren leaving water
* Improved AI behavior
* Added mob drops (Dryad, Doll)
* Added 14+ advancements
* Advancement-based recipe unlocks

---

### **v1.3.7**

* Doll generates Redstone over time
* Withering Rose gains projectile effect
* Added Puppet
* Added Syringe and Diamond Anchor

---

### **v1.4.6**

* Added Sinless Seven
* Added Marionette
* Upgraded Syringe
* Added Remote
* Added Guide Menu (`B`)
* Fixed Hammer physics bug
* Added 3+ advancements

---

### **v1.5.7**

* Added Green Lantern
* Doll/Puppet/Marionette can take player damage
* Added Demiflower (with crash fixes)
* Updated Siren + added Siren Anchor
* Added Sirenade Armor and Scale ingot
* Anchor durability changes in water

---

### **v1.6.3**

* Added **Seedling** plant
* Added **Melia** (duplicates and drops honey)
* Added **Honey Anchor** and **Waxed Grimoire**
* Expanded progression systems
* Total advancements increased to **48**

---

### 🏁 Developer Note

> This mod has been tested in survival and supports a full playthrough, including defeating the Ender Dragon, while remaining fair and balanced.

---

## ⚙️ Notes

Designed to expand gameplay depth without straying far from vanilla mechanics.
